title: Remove login requirement for form submissions & style tagline

requirements.text: Remove Internet Identity authentication requirement from all public-facing form submissions. The Contact form, Estimate Calculator, and Chatbot query submission form must allow anonymous users to submit without logging in. Authentication should only be required for the admin panel.

quotes: login not required for submission of forms

acceptanceCriteria: A user who is not logged in can submit the Contact form successfully
A user who is not logged in can submit the Estimate Calculator form successfully
A user who is not logged in can submit a query via the Chatbot form successfully
The admin panel still requires Internet Identity login to access
Backend actor accepts anonymous calls for submitQueryForm, submitContactForm, and submitCalculatorLead

requirements.text: In the Hero section, style the tagline text 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' to be big, bold, and orange in color.

quotes: urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations to be in same font size and orange colour

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' is displayed in a large font size
The text is bold (font-weight bold or semibold)

constraints: Admin panel must remain protected behind Internet Identity authentication
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the admin panel access control
Redesigning the overall layout or color theme
